analysis_note: All analyses used only files in the bundle directory. Effects are signed in months of pfs_months. P-values are large-sample OLS/Welch normal-approximation p-values from an exploratory analysis and are not multiplicity-adjusted.

proposed_hypotheses.text: For `feature_041`, each 1-unit increase is associated with higher `pfs_months`.
Patients with `feature_036` equal to 2 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_036` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Simple OLS gave a positive slope of 0.1699 months of PFS per 1-unit higher `feature_041`.
analyses.method: Simple linear regression of pfs_months on feature_041.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS was 2.1519 months for `feature_036=2` versus 4.3268 months for `feature_036=0`.
analyses.method: Welch difference in means, feature_036=2 minus feature_036=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_001` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_001` equal to 0.
Patients with `feature_042` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_042` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS was 2.9246 months for `feature_001=1` and 4.3621 months for `feature_001=0`.
Mean PFS was 2.7426 months for `feature_042=1` and 3.6633 months for `feature_042=0`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_015` equal to `squamous` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_015` equal to `adenocarcinoma`.
Patients with `feature_025` equal to `former` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_025` equal to `current`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS was 2.8129 months for `feature_015=squamous` and 3.6698 months for `feature_015=adenocarcinoma`.
Mean PFS was 3.6071 months for `feature_025=former` and 2.9873 months for `feature_025=current`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: For `feature_004`, each 1-unit increase is associated with lower `pfs_months`.
For `feature_056`, each 1-unit increase is associated with higher `pfs_months`.
For `feature_051`, each 1-unit increase is associated with slightly lower `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Simple OLS slope for `feature_004` was -0.0733 months per unit.
Simple OLS slope for `feature_056` was +0.4411 months per unit.
Simple OLS slope for `feature_051` was -0.00051 months per unit; the magnitude is small but statistically detectable.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_010` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_010` equal to 0.
Patients with `feature_057` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_057` equal to 0.
Patients with `feature_009` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_009` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS was 4.1136 months for `feature_010=1` and 3.3320 months for `feature_010=0`.
Mean PFS was 2.6611 months for `feature_057=1` and 3.4715 months for `feature_057=0`.
Mean PFS was 3.6406 months for `feature_009=1` and 3.3186 months for `feature_009=0`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_037` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_037` equal to 0.
Patients with `feature_028` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_028` equal to 0.
Patients with `feature_066` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_066` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS was 3.3186 months for `feature_037=1` and 3.5230 months for `feature_037=0`.
Mean PFS was 3.2959 months for `feature_028=1` and 3.4857 months for `feature_028=0`.
Mean PFS was 3.5958 months for `feature_066=1` and 3.4070 months for `feature_066=0`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After multivariable adjustment for the leading baseline and binary features, the main-effect associations for `feature_041`, `feature_036`, `feature_001`, `feature_042`, `feature_015`, `feature_025`, `feature_010`, `feature_009`, and `feature_037` remain in the same directions.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for `feature_041` was +0.1684 months per unit.
Adjusted OLS coefficient for `feature_036=2` versus 0 was -2.1775 months.
Adjusted OLS coefficient for `feature_001=1` versus 0 was -1.4168 months.
Adjusted OLS coefficient for `feature_042=1` versus 0 was -0.9122 months.
Adjusted OLS coefficient for `feature_010=1` versus 0 was +0.8924 months.
Adjusted OLS coefficient for `feature_009=1` versus 0 was +0.3231 months.
Adjusted OLS coefficient for `feature_025=never` versus current was +0.5453 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The apparent unadjusted associations for `feature_057`, `feature_028`, and `feature_066` are largely explained by other features; after adjustment their effects are near zero.

analyses.result_summary: After all-feature adjustment, `feature_057=1` had coefficient -0.0283 months and was not significant at 0.05.
After selected adjustment, `feature_028=1` had coefficient -0.0054 months and was not significant.
After selected adjustment, `feature_066=1` had coefficient -0.0007 months and was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_010=1` with `pfs_months` is larger when `feature_009=1`; the `feature_010` by `feature_009` interaction is positive.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted two-way OLS interaction `feature_010:feature_009` was +2.5577 months.
Core-adjusted two-way interaction `feature_010:feature_009` was +2.5406 months.
analyses.method: Adjusted OLS including core covariates and the interaction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within patients with `feature_009=1`, `feature_010=1` is associated with higher `pfs_months`, while within patients with `feature_009=0` the `feature_010` association is absent or reversed.

analyses.result_summary: Within `feature_009=1`, mean PFS was 5.7657 months for `feature_010=1` and 3.3285 months for `feature_010=0`.
Within `feature_009=0`, mean PFS was 3.2133 months for `feature_010=1` and 3.3339 months for `feature_010=0`, a small negative difference.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_037=1` attenuates or reverses the positive association between `feature_010=1` and `pfs_months`; the `feature_037` by `feature_010` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: Core-adjusted interaction `feature_037:feature_010` was -1.6239 months.
Within `feature_037=0`, `feature_010=1` was associated with +1.5424 months of PFS.
Within `feature_037=1`, `feature_010=1` was associated with -0.1517 months of PFS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_037=1` attenuates the positive association between `feature_009=1` and `pfs_months`; the `feature_037` by `feature_009` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: Core-adjusted interaction `feature_037:feature_009` was -0.5843 months.
Within `feature_037=0`, `feature_009=1` was associated with +0.5709 months of PFS.
Within `feature_037=1`, `feature_009=1` was associated with +0.0086 months and was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive `feature_010` by `feature_009` synergy is concentrated among patients with `feature_037=0`; the three-way interaction `feature_037:feature_010:feature_009` is negative.

analyses.result_summary: Core-adjusted three-way interaction `feature_037:feature_010:feature_009` was -4.5767 months.
analyses.method: Adjusted OLS with all lower-order terms and the three-way interaction.

analyses.result_summary: The subgroup `feature_037=0`, `feature_010=1`, `feature_009=1` had mean PFS 7.8760 months versus 3.3188 months in everyone else.
analyses.method: Welch difference in means for the triple-defined subgroup versus all others.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_057=1` weakens the positive association between `feature_010=1` and `pfs_months`; the `feature_010` by `feature_057` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: Core-adjusted interaction `feature_010:feature_057` was -0.8797 months.
Stratified means were consistent: when `feature_057=0`, `feature_010=1` had mean 4.1898 versus 3.3656 months; when `feature_057=1`, `feature_010=1` had mean 2.3162 versus 2.7016 months.
analyses.method: Interaction model supported by stratified means.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association of `feature_001=1` with `pfs_months` is less severe at higher levels of `feature_036`; interactions of `feature_036=1` and `feature_036=2` with `feature_001` are positive.

analyses.result_summary: Core-adjusted interaction `feature_036=1:feature_001` was +0.0690 months.
Core-adjusted interaction `feature_036=2:feature_001` was +0.2309 months.
Stratified unadjusted effects of `feature_001=1` were -1.5295, -1.4250, and -1.3061 months within `feature_036` levels 0, 1, and 2 respectively.
analyses.method: Subgroup differences support attenuation at higher feature_036 levels.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association of `feature_042=1` with `pfs_months` is less severe at higher levels of `feature_036`; interactions of `feature_036=1` and `feature_036=2` with `feature_042` are positive.

analyses.result_summary: Core-adjusted interaction `feature_036=1:feature_042` was +0.0602 months.
Core-adjusted interaction `feature_036=2:feature_042` was +0.1705 months.
Stratified effects of `feature_042=1` were -1.0075, -0.9066, and -0.8350 months within `feature_036` levels 0, 1, and 2.
analyses.method: Subgroup differences support attenuation at higher feature_036 levels.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive `feature_041` slope is weaker when `feature_036` is higher; interactions of `feature_041` with `feature_036=1` and `feature_036=2` are negative.

analyses.result_summary: Core-adjusted interaction `feature_041:feature_036=1` was -0.0083 months per unit.
Core-adjusted interaction `feature_041:feature_036=2` was -0.0318 months per unit.
Simple slopes of `feature_041` were +0.1790, +0.1701, and +0.1464 months per unit within `feature_036` levels 0, 1, and 2.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_015=squamous` attenuates the negative association between `feature_001=1` and `pfs_months`; the `feature_015_squamous:feature_001` interaction is positive.

analyses.result_summary: Core-adjusted interaction `feature_015=squamous:feature_001` was +0.0743 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_015=squamous` does not meaningfully modify the `feature_010` by `feature_009` synergy; the `feature_015_squamous:feature_010:feature_009` interaction is near zero.

analyses.result_summary: The three-way interaction `feature_015=squamous:feature_010:feature_009` was +0.0149 months and was not significant.
analyses.method: Adjusted OLS with lower-order terms and three-way interaction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_025` does not strongly modify the `feature_010` by `feature_009` synergy; any modification is small relative to the main synergy.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_025=former:feature_010:feature_009` interaction was +0.0235 months and not significant.
`feature_025=never:feature_010:feature_009` interaction was -0.3160 months, significant but small relative to the +2.53 month base synergy.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive `feature_010` by `feature_009` synergy remains large across all `feature_036` levels; interactions with `feature_036` are small compared with the base synergy.

analyses.result_summary: In the `feature_036` interaction model, the base `feature_010:feature_009` synergy was +2.4723 months.
analyses.method: Adjusted OLS with feature_036-specific interaction increments.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_036=1:feature_010:feature_009` added +0.1135 months to the synergy.
`feature_036=2:feature_010:feature_009` added +0.0372 months and was not significant.
Among `feature_009=1` patients, the `feature_010=1` difference was +2.3440, +2.5059, and +2.4816 months in `feature_036` levels 0, 1, and 2.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for all available features, any remaining independent associations outside the dominant feature set are small in magnitude.

analyses.result_summary: The largest remaining adjusted non-dominant binary coefficient was `feature_029=1` at -0.1095 months.
`feature_048=1` had a small adjusted coefficient of -0.0292 months.
`feature_023=1` had a small adjusted coefficient of -0.0192 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The weak unadjusted continuous-feature signals for `feature_013` and nearby low-magnitude continuous markers do not remain significant after all-feature adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: All-feature adjusted coefficient for `feature_013` was +0.0011 months per unit and not significant.
All-feature adjusted coefficient for `feature_070` was -0.0011 months per unit and not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A lower-PFS profile is independently marked by `feature_036=2`, `feature_001=1`, `feature_042=1`, and `feature_015=squamous`, each contributing negative adjusted effects.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_036=2` versus 0 contributed -2.1775 adjusted months.
`feature_001=1` contributed -1.4168 adjusted months.
`feature_042=1` contributed -0.9122 adjusted months.
`feature_015=squamous` contributed -0.7229 adjusted months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The highest-PFS subgroup is defined by `feature_037=0`, `feature_010=1`, and `feature_009=1`; this subgroup has substantially higher mean `pfs_months` than all other patients.

analyses.result_summary: The subgroup `feature_037=0`, `feature_010=1`, `feature_009=1` had mean PFS 7.8760 months versus 3.3188 months in all other patients.
analyses.method: Welch difference in means for the triple-defined subgroup versus all others.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted three-way model independently supported this pattern with `feature_037:feature_010:feature_009` coefficient -4.5767 months, showing that the `feature_010:feature_009` synergy collapses when `feature_037=1`.
